hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"⛔ ZERO-EXTRA RULE (AGENTS.md): build ONLY what the user asked + ONLY what is in the Figma file — not 1px more. No invented states (hover/focus/disabled), behavior, variants, configurable props, placeholders, or abstractions. Raw values only (literal hex/px, never tokens). If NOT directly in Figma -> SKIP and note for a later phase; if it IS in Figma -> include it. When unsure, leave it out."}}'
